task: Review overnight contract, AP-hold, and utilization exceptions to set branch priorities.
tool_today: RentalMan contract/AP reports, utilization dashboards, spreadsheets
decision_content: Which exceptions need same-day follow-up, escalation, or customer contact.

task: Walk the yard to confirm equipment readiness, status accuracy, and presentation against what the system says is available.
tool_today: Physical yard walk, RentalMan status screens, paper/mobile notes
decision_content: Whether a unit is truly rent-ready, needs staging, or must be pulled into service.

task: Manage slow-moving and underutilized fleet by deciding when to promote, transfer, or rebalance equipment.
tool_today: Utilization reports, branch benchmark data, calls with sales and sister branches
decision_content: Whether to hold, discount, transfer, or reposition units to protect utilization and margin.

task: Coordinate dispatch exceptions, delivery sequencing, and pickup priorities with yard and driver teams.
tool_today: Scheduler/GPS map, phone, text, dispatch board
decision_content: Which jobs move first when schedules slip and how to recover service without double-booking assets.

task: Coordinate unavailable units, maintenance priorities, and shop follow-up to protect uptime and promised deliveries.
tool_today: Work orders, telematics alerts, shop board, calls with foreman and mechanics
decision_content: Whether to expedite repair, swap equipment, or escalate risk to customers and regional leaders.

task: Review weekly sales plans, route opportunities between counter and outside sales, and follow up on key customers.
tool_today: Customer history in RMS/CRM, sales plans, phone and email
decision_content: Which opportunities stay transactional, which need relationship selling, and where manager attention will protect revenue.

task: Assemble the branch performance and exception pack for monthly regional review.
tool_today: RentalMan reports, spreadsheets, email, presentation docs
decision_content: Which branch variances need explanation, escalation, or a corrective action plan before regional review.

task: Recommend whether demand gaps should be covered by transfer, re-rent, or purchase.
frequency: as shortages and demand spikes arise
tool_today: Demand signals, availability reports, vendor calls, branch benchmark data
decision_content: Whether to spend money externally, move fleet internally, or propose capex based on margin, uptime, and future demand.
